name: brooks-lint
description: AI code reviews grounded in six classic engineering books.
author: hyhmrright

commands.name: brooks-review
commands.description: Run a Brooks-Lint PR review on the current code or diff

commands.name: brooks-audit
commands.description: Run a Brooks-Lint architecture audit on the project

commands.name: brooks-debt
commands.description: Assess technical debt using the Brooks-Lint framework

commands.name: brooks-test
commands.description: Review test suite quality using the Brooks-Lint framework
